content:
🔥 webnovel-writer | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: AI-assisted long-form web novel writing, ensuring consistency and coherence over extended narratives.
✨ Key Features: • Manages character settings, plot points, and world-building rules • Solves AI 'forgetting' and 'hallucination' issues in long-form writing • Supports serialization of up to 2 million characters • Integrates with Claude Code via a plugin
📖 Summary: Webnovel Writer is a Python-based system designed to assist in writing long-form web novels using Claude Code. It addresses common AI writing issues like memory loss and hallucinations by managing plot points, character settings, and world-building rules, enabling continuous serialization of up to 2 million characters without contradictions.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
